notes: First-iteration baseline for the speed-parity gate (spec dart.md §11). build_ms is the squeezy total over 8 fixture files (vendor/ and codegen widget.g.dart excluded); oracle_ms is wall time of the package:analyzer subprocess (cold start dominates — warm runs land around 1-2s). The analyzer cold start is the long pole because AnalysisContextCollection reads dart:core/dart:async from the SDK; gates do not enforce a speed bound on Dart in the first PR per spec §11.
